hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.py) python3 -m py_compile "$f" 2>&1 || true ;; esac; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.ts) cd /Volumes/Elements/shree/claude/MyBiz/TravelPlanner/frontend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 || true ;; esac; }
